---
title: "Cyclic Testing and Numerical Modeling of a Three-Story Mass-Timber Building with a Pivoting Mass Ply Panel Spine and Buckling-Restrained Energy Dissipators"
date: 2023-06-21
categories: [conference, mass-timber]
venue: "2023 World Conference on Timber Engineering, Oslo, Norway"
description: "Cyclic testing and numerical modeling of a three-story mass-timber building with a pivoting MPP spine and BRBs."
---

## Event

**2023 World Conference on Timber Engineering (WCTE)**  
Oslo, Norway · June 21, 2023

## Related links

- [Research](/research.qmd)
- [Publications](/publications.qmd)
